expectations.evidence: Uses #09090b instead of #0a0a0a, emerald-500/red-500 instead of custom #00ff9d/#ff3b3b tokens, no rgba opacity system
Uses backdrop-blur-sm (4px) instead of 14px, bg-gradient-to-br instead of solid rgba glass, no saturate
Uses text-sm/text-2xl without explicit font-mono, uses default sans-serif font stack
Uses rounded-2xl (16px) on cards instead of 8px, rounded-full on badges instead of 2px
Has hover glow effect with emerald/red blur orb, border lightening
No // prefix labels, uses plain text-zinc-400 labels without uppercase tracking
No tabular-nums class on any numeric values
Uses emerald-400/red-400 for positive/negative, but wrong colors (emerald vs #00ff9d)
